experiences.label: english_bounded_queue
experiences.body: A bounded worker queue rejected excess arrivals before worker saturation and kept tail latency stable.
experiences.mechanism: Backpressure limits arrivals when queue saturation rises.
applicability: worker concurrency is fixed
falsifiers: Tail latency rises after admission is bounded.

experiences.label: chinese_cache_singleflight
experiences.body: 缓存租约到期时，单飞锁只允许一个请求重建数据，其余请求复用结果。
experiences.summary: 缓存租约防止并发重建雪崩
experiences.mechanism: 单飞锁把同一缓存键的并发重建合并为一个请求。
applicability: 缓存键可以稳定归一化
falsifiers: 相同缓存键仍然出现多个并发重建任务。

experiences.label: mixed_lease_epoch
experiences.body: Lease epoch 保护主节点切换：旧 leader 的写入会被新的 epoch fence 拒绝。
experiences.summary: Lease epoch 保护 leader handoff
experiences.mechanism: A monotonic epoch fence rejects stale primary writes during 主节点切换.
applicability: all writers carry the observed epoch
falsifiers: A stale leader commits after a newer epoch is visible.

experiences.label: cold_retry_budget
experiences.body: A retry budget stopped clients from amplifying a partial outage into a cascading retry storm.
experiences.summary: Retry budget contains cascading retry storm
experiences.mechanism: A shared retry token budget caps aggregate retry amplification.
applicability: clients share one observable failure budget
falsifiers: Retry traffic exceeds the configured aggregate budget.

experiences.label: cold_schema_epoch
experiences.body: A schema epoch attached to each mutation rejected stale writers after an online migration.
experiences.mechanism: Version fencing compares every write against the current schema epoch.
applicability: all mutations declare a schema epoch
falsifiers: A write with an older schema epoch is accepted.

experiences.label: cold_pressure_feedback
experiences.body: A relief loop stabilized a steam vessel by releasing pressure in proportion to measured oscillation.
experiences.mechanism: Negative feedback pressure relief stabilizes oscillation.
applicability: pressure sensing latency stays below one control period
falsifiers: Oscillation grows after proportional pressure relief.

experiences.label: cold_mycelium_reroute
experiences.body: A damaged fungal network shifted nutrient transport toward surviving neighboring paths without a central planner.
experiences.mechanism: Distributed rerouting follows surviving local paths.
applicability: neighboring paths expose local capacity signals
falsifiers: Transport continues through a severed path despite available neighbors.

experiences.label: cold_distractor_irrigation
experiences.body: A garden controller opened moisture valves in a fixed rotation after dawn.
experiences.mechanism: Moisture valves schedule irrigation zones.
applicability: soil probes are calibrated
falsifiers: Dry zones receive no water during their scheduled rotation.

experiences.label: cold_distractor_ceramic
experiences.body: A kiln ramp paused near peak temperature to change the crystal texture of a glaze.
experiences.mechanism: Kiln ramp timing controls glaze crystal formation.
applicability: the clay body tolerates the peak temperature
falsifiers: The pause leaves crystal texture unchanged.

experiences.label: cold_distractor_orchestra
experiences.body: Section leaders aligned tempo by listening for a shared acoustic pulse.
experiences.mechanism: Acoustic cues synchronize section timing.
applicability: performers can hear the shared pulse
falsifiers: Sections drift despite an audible shared pulse.

experiences.label: capsule_bounded_dispatch
experiences.body: Dispatchers admitted jobs only while bounded capacity remained, preventing a shared worker pool from collapsing.
experiences.mechanism: Admission tokens couple producer rate to available worker capacity.
applicability: worker capacity is measurable before admission
falsifiers: Worker collapse occurs while admission remains below measured capacity.

experiences.label: orion_queue_feedback
experiences.body: ORION queue admission lowered intake as saturation increased.
experiences.mechanism: ORION negative feedback threshold regulates queue intake.
applicability: ORION saturation measurement is current
falsifiers: ORION intake rises when saturation crosses the threshold.

experiences.label: orion_steam_feedback
experiences.body: ORION steam relief increased as vessel pressure approached its limit.
experiences.mechanism: ORION negative feedback threshold regulates steam pressure.
applicability: ORION pressure sensor delay is bounded
falsifiers: ORION pressure rises after relief crosses the threshold.

experiences.label: orion_immune_feedback
experiences.body: ORION immune checkpoints reduced inflammatory signaling after activation grew.
experiences.mechanism: ORION negative feedback threshold regulates inflammation.
applicability: ORION checkpoint receptors remain responsive
falsifiers: ORION inflammation rises after checkpoint activation.

experiences.label: lyra_network_buffer
experiences.body: LYRA network batching absorbed short traffic spikes before forwarding packets.
experiences.mechanism: LYRA buffer hysteresis separates fill and release thresholds.
applicability: LYRA spikes are shorter than buffer drain time
falsifiers: LYRA forwarding oscillates between fill and release thresholds.

experiences.label: lyra_battery_buffer
experiences.body: LYRA battery reserve absorbed renewable variation before serving demand.
experiences.mechanism: LYRA buffer hysteresis separates charge and discharge thresholds.
applicability: LYRA reserve exceeds one variation interval
falsifiers: LYRA storage chatters between charge and discharge thresholds.

experiences.label: lyra_inventory_buffer
experiences.body: LYRA reserve stock absorbed supplier variation before assembly stopped.
experiences.mechanism: LYRA buffer hysteresis separates reorder and release thresholds.
applicability: LYRA replenishment lead time is observable
falsifiers: LYRA inventory chatters around reorder and release thresholds.

experiences.label: nova_database_quorum
experiences.body: NOVA replicas committed after a majority confirmed the same log position.
experiences.mechanism: NOVA redundant quorum masks one failing participant.
applicability: NOVA failures remain below quorum tolerance
falsifiers: NOVA commits diverge while a majority is reachable.

experiences.label: nova_sensor_quorum
experiences.body: NOVA sensors accepted a reading after a majority agreed within tolerance.
experiences.mechanism: NOVA redundant quorum masks one drifting participant.
applicability: NOVA sensor errors are independent
falsifiers: NOVA majority readings drift together outside tolerance.

experiences.label: nova_review_quorum
experiences.body: NOVA reviewers approved a release after independent checks reached a majority.
experiences.mechanism: NOVA redundant quorum masks one mistaken participant.
applicability: NOVA reviewers inspect independently
falsifiers: NOVA majority approval repeats one shared review error.

experiences.label: zenith_trace_sampling
experiences.body: ZENITH tracing increased capture around rare latency spikes.
experiences.mechanism: ZENITH adaptive sampling allocates observations by surprise.
applicability: ZENITH surprise scores arrive before traces expire
falsifiers: ZENITH rare spikes receive fewer observations than routine traffic.

experiences.label: zenith_quality_sampling
experiences.body: ZENITH inspection increased checks around unusual production defects.
experiences.mechanism: ZENITH adaptive sampling allocates inspections by surprise.
applicability: ZENITH defect signals arrive before the batch closes
falsifiers: ZENITH unusual defects receive fewer checks than routine products.

experiences.label: zenith_ecology_sampling
experiences.body: ZENITH field surveys increased observations around unusual habitat changes.
experiences.mechanism: ZENITH adaptive sampling allocates surveys by surprise.
applicability: ZENITH habitat signals arrive before survey teams move
falsifiers: ZENITH unusual habitats receive fewer surveys than stable sites.
